effects.mechanism: Contains non-heme iron (2 mg/100g). One-half cup (126g) provides 2.5 mg iron. Absorption depends on enhancers/inhibitors.

modifiers.description: Vitamin C enhances non-heme iron absorption

effects.notes: Good plant-based iron source. Calcium-set tofu also provides significant calcium.

sources.title: Iron Fact Sheet for Health Professionals - NIH

effects.mechanism: Calcium-set tofu is an excellent calcium source (350 mg/100g). One-half cup provides 441 mg (34% DV). Note: Not all tofu is calcium-set.
effects.notes: Check label for 'calcium sulfate' or 'calcium chloride' in ingredients.

sources.title: Calcium Fact Sheet for Health Professionals - NIH

nutrition_sources.title: USDA FoodData Central - Tofu, firm, prepared with calcium sulfate
